name: Baked Carrots and Potatoes with Nutmeg
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, sauté onions in the vegetable broth.
2. Place half of the carrots in a casserole dish sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Top with half of the potatoes and all of the onions.
4. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
5. Repeat with the remaining vegetables.
6. Pour in the skim milk.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until the vegetables are done and the liquid is absorbed.
